title: elatinoides lanigera var. dealbata
intro: Elatinoides lanigera var. dealbata, also known as the woolly elatine, is a plant species belonging to the Elatinaceae family and is native to various parts of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with woolly elatine include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Woolly elatine can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a valuable addition to holistic remedies and natural health practices.
